name: harpe
description: PDF → sections library. Returns an in-memory document of titled, paginated sections; no persistence, no embeddings.

scripts.smoke: npm run build && node bin/harpe.js docs/hearst.ranch.winery.tasting.room.guide.1.pdf --titles-only | grep -q 'tock-host-training' && node bin/harpe.js docs/Hearst_Ranch_Winery_Employee_Handbook_529776_en.1.pdf --titles-only | grep -qE '^[0-9]+(-[0-9]+)+-'
